headline: Nail EQ, Power Query, and Productive this week to level up your consulting game 🚀

stories.title: Emotional Intelligence: The Skill That Actually Separates Good Consultants From Great Ones
stories.summary: EQ is lowkey the most underrated skill in consulting right now. While AI handles the data crunching, consultants with high emotional intelligence are the ones building real client trust and leading change.
stories.takeaway: Start building EQ by practicing active listening, managing your own emotions under pressure, and understanding your client's emotional triggers—it's what keeps people coming back.

stories.title: Power Query Fuzzy Matching: Stop Spending Hours Cleaning Data Manually
stories.summary: Power Query's fuzzy matching feature is a total game-changer for messy Excel datasets. One-click fixes that used to take hours—plus it automates the whole process so you only clean once.
stories.takeaway: Use fuzzy matching to merge messy exports with clean master databases in seconds. Once you set it up, hit Refresh next month instead of rebuilding the whole thing from scratch.

stories.title: Productive: The All-in-One Consulting Software That Actually Connects Time, Budgets, and Billing
stories.summary: Productive ties together project management, time tracking, budgeting, and invoicing so you're not juggling five different tools. Real-time profit tracking means you see margin issues before they become disasters.
stories.takeaway: Track billable vs non-billable hours, generate custom invoices, and watch profitability across client projects in one place. The game-changer: 50+ customizable report templates.

watchNext.title: Why Consultants Must Master Adaptability in 2026 (Or Get Left Behind)
watchNext.why: The consulting world is moving faster than ever. Adaptability is the actual skill that lets you pivot on client needs without losing your mind.

watchNext.title: Excel + Power BI Integration: Turn Your Cleaned Data Into Client-Ready Dashboards
watchNext.why: Once your data is clean in Power Query, flowing it straight into Power BI dashboards saves a ton of rework and keeps your reporting consistent across teams.
